opps.title: HCD Due Diligence Contract Workforce Development and BUX
opps.summary:
Background
 The Millennium Challenge Corporation (MCC) is a Federal Corporation established to provide grant assistance aimed at fostering economic growth and reducing poverty in select developing countries. 

The MCC's Human and Community Development (HCD) practice group seeks a contractor to deliver technical consulting services across various sectors, including education, workforce development,
win_reasons: CX/UX/HCD scope — BLN24 proven prime (IRS $22M, Studio24)
Note: CX scope but unfamiliar agency — relationship building needed
DoD scope — BLN24 has facility clearance + Dynamo/BAH sub experience
NAICS 541611 aligns with registered capabilities
teaming_needed: Cleared prime required: Dynamo Technologies or Booz Allen Hamilton
